title: Tab Relay
brief: Use tabs to inspect a spec file and patch a TODO list.
objectives: Replace both TODO tokens in tasks.md.
hints: Create a new tab for spec: :tabedit workspace/spec.md.
Switch tabs with gt and gT.
primary_path: Open spec in a tab: `:tabedit workspace/spec.md`.
Use `gt`/`gT` to move between tabs and apply values in `tasks.md`.
fallback_path: Buffer fallback: open with `:e workspace/spec.md` and return via `:b#`.
Split fallback: `:vsplit workspace/spec.md` if tabs feel slow.
why_path: Tabs are a clean mental model for separate files while preserving focused editing state per tab.
nvim_reference: open file in new tab: `:tabedit workspace/spec.md`
pro_move: Tabs are handy when you want one context per file with minimal window juggling.
